tools.name: record_outcome
tools.description:
Record an interaction outcome for an agent. kind: success | delivered |
    dispute_won | failure | undelivered | dispute_lost | timeout |
    security_incident (security incidents carry a 3x penalty).

tools.name: score_agent
tools.description:
Get an agent's decay-weighted trust score in [0,1] and tier. Unknown
    agents get a neutral 0.5 prior — no blind trust, no unfair zero.

tools.name: attest
tools.description: Issue a tamper-evident (hash-chained) trust attestation for an agent.

tools.name: verify_attestation
tools.description: Verify a previously issued attestation by recomputing its hash.

tools.name: history
tools.description: Full outcome history + attestation count + current score for an agent.
